label: Uncomplicated corn or callus without diabetic foot or infection
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated corn or callus.
No open wound, secondary infection, diabetic-foot/PVD/neuropathy risk, severe pain, inability to walk, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Diabetic foot risk, neuropathy, PVD, open wound, ulcer, cellulitis, abscess, bleeding crack, black skin, or systemic illness.
Severe pain, inability to walk, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed podiatry plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care or podiatry if pain persists, walking is affected, or you have diabetes, poor circulation, or numbness.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports corn/callus framing as thickened skin from pressure or friction, with pressure reduction and protective measures. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated corn/callus without open wound, infection, diabetic-foot/PVD/neuropathy risk, severe ambulation problem, systemic illness, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed podiatry plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports corn/callus framing as thickened skin from pressure or friction, with pressure reduction and protective measures. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated corn/callus without open wound, infection, diabetic-foot/PVD/neuropathy risk, severe ambulation problem, systemic illness, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed podiatry plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated corn or callus
no diabetic foot, open wound, foot wound, cellulitis, or secondary infection documented
no PVD/neuropathy, severe ambulation, systemic illness, pregnancy, pediatric, or specialist-directed pathway
